## Collections.CacheInvalidatingResultMapWrapper.getOrAdd() method

Gets a value from the map, or adds a value created by a factory if it does not exist. Invalidates the cache entry for the key if a new value is added.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getOrAdd(key: TK, factory: ResultMapValueFactory<TK, TSRC>): DetailedResult<TSRC, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```

</td><td>
